Assist. Prof. Nuray Söğünmez Erdoğan and her Student Wardah Afzal Rinch’s Work Has Been Published at 2023 ASYU!

Assist.  Prof. Nuray Söğünmez Erdoğan and her student Wardah Afzal Rinch’s work titled “Deciphering the Cluster-Specific Marker Genes via Integration of Single Cell RNA Sequencing Datasets” has been published at the 2023 Conference on Innovations and Applications in Intelligent Systems held in Sivas on October 11-13, 2023. Congratulations to Assist. Prof. Nuray Söğünmez Erdoğan and her student Wardah Afzal Rinch!

W. A. Rinch, N. Sogunmez, A. Altaf, H. F. Alsan and T. Arsan, “Deciphering the Cluster-Specific Marker Genes via Integration of Single Cell RNA Sequencing Datasets,” 2023 Innovations in Intelligent Systems and Applications Conference (ASYU), Sivas, Turkiye, 2023, pp. 1-6, doi: 10.1109/ASYU58738.2023.10296679.

10.1109/ASYU58738.2023.10296679.
